content: Backend: config env vars (LinkedIn Jobs API + VAPID/push contact)
Backend: services/push.py (VAPID keygen, subscriptions, send_push) + services/notify.py shared notifier
Backend: routes/push.py (public-key, subscribe, unsubscribe, test) + mount in server.py
Backend: services/reindex.py — continuous re-index + auto memory learning (continuous consumption)
Backend: services/skills/jobs_provider.py (LinkedIn/JSearch + mock) + jobs.py search/save + routes
Backend: wire scheduler -> shared notifier (push), reindex job, server startup vapid init
Test backend (testing_agent): push, reindex/auto-learn, jobs search/fallback, clean-slate gating
Frontend: Entity Home redesign (cinematic living orb, conversation-first, ambient presence, 'what I learned')
Frontend: Settings push section + Jobs search UI
Wipe all non-demo accounts (clean-slate) for fresh user test
Deployment readiness check (deployment_agent) + per-user cost & pricing analysis
